title: cineraria deltoidea
intro: Cineraria deltoidea is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Cineraria deltoidea include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
